alex-chen.name: Alex Chen
alex-chen.bio: I'm a product designer with 6 years of experience crafting intuitive digital experiences for startups and Fortune 500 companies. I believe great design is invisible — it just works. Currently available for freelance projects.

maya-johnson.name: Maya Johnson
maya-johnson.bio: Helping brands find their voice and visual identity since 2018. I work with small businesses and personal brands who are ready to level up their presence. Bold ideas, beautiful execution.
